outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran war: Trump to address nation; Kharazi injured in Tehran strike; Pezeshkian open letter to Americans
outlets.summary: Comprehensive live updates on Day 33: Trump primetime address, Kharazi struck, Pezeshkian letter, oil falling on peace signals.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Americans have little appetite for sending US troops to Iran, polls show — Trump approval on economy at career low 31%
outlets.summary: 60% disapprove of military action in Iran. Public opinion shifting against the war as gas prices cross $4.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran requested ceasefire; will address nation tonight with 'important update' on Iran war
outlets.summary: Live updates covering Trump's ceasefire claim (denied by Iran), scheduled 9PM ET primetime address, Hegseth: 'decisive days ahead.'

outlets.name: White House
outlets.headline: President Trump's Clear and Unchanging Objectives Drive Decisive Success Against Iranian Regime
outlets.summary: Official press release outlining war objectives: obliterate missile arsenal, annihilate navy, sever proxy support.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war Day 33: What is happening — coordinated triple-front barrage on Passover eve
outlets.summary: Day 33 comprehensive overview: triple-front attack, Kharazi struck, NATO pushback, Pezeshkian letter, Hormuz still closed.

outlets.name: Reuters/Gulf News
outlets.headline: Day 33: Trump claims Iran president wants ceasefire — Tehran calls it 'false and baseless'
outlets.summary: Gulf-focused coverage: Kuwait airport drone fire, Aqua 1 tanker hit, 1 killed UAE, Trump 2-3 weeks claim.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Iran fires largest missile barrage in weeks as Israelis sit down for Passover Seder — 16 wounded
outlets.summary: Cluster munitions hit Bnei Brak, 11-year-old girl critical. IDF kills Hezbollah commander. IDF war support 78% among Jewish Israelis.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel's Military Stretched to Breaking Point — faces familiar deadly stalemate in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Analysis: IDF overextended fighting on three fronts. Lebanon ground invasion expanding but progress slow.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Araghchi: Iran prepared for 6 months of war — seeks complete end, not ceasefire
outlets.summary: State media amplifies Araghchi's defiant Al Jazeera interview and Pezeshkian's open letter to Americans.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: US-Israeli aggression on Iran: Kharazi struck, pharmaceutical factory destroyed — war on Islamic region
outlets.summary: Frames strikes on Kharazi, Tofigh Daru factory, steel plants, and religious sites as collective punishment.
